sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "workspaces" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "color" INTEGER NOT NULL, "icon" TEXT NOT NULL, "enabled_modules" TEXT NOT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "default_hourly_rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "body" TEXT NOT NULL, "parent_type" TEXT NULL, "parent_id" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notes_fts" USING fts5(title, body, content='notes', content_rowid='rowid');
CREATE TRIGGER notes_fts_insert AFTER INSERT ON notes BEGIN INSERT INTO notes_fts ("rowid", title, body) VALUES (new."rowid", new.title, new.body);END
CREATE TRIGGER notes_fts_delete AFTER DELETE ON notes BEGIN INSERT INTO notes_fts (notes_fts, "rowid", title, body) VALUES ('delete', old."rowid", old.title, old.body);END

CREATE TRIGGER notes_fts_update AFTER UPDATE ON notes BEGIN INSERT INTO notes_fts (notes_fts, "rowid", title, body) VALUES ('delete', old."rowid", old.title, old.body);INSERT INTO notes_fts ("rowid", title, body) VALUES (new."rowid", new.title, new.body);END

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "organization" TEXT NULL, "notes_text" TEXT NULL, "default_hourly_rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "workspace_contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "contact_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "role_label" TEXT NULL, "hourly_rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "projects" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "color" INTEGER NULL, "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "archived" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("archived" IN (0, 1)), "hourly_rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "event_series" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "location" TEXT NULL, "local_starts_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "duration_ms" INTEGER NOT NULL, "timezone_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "all_day" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("all_day" IN (0, 1)), "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "reminder_offset_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "rule_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "ends_before_local" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "event_series_contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "series_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES event_series (id), "contact_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "events" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "location" TEXT NULL, "starts_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ends_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "all_day" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("all_day" IN (0, 1)), "rrule" TEXT NULL, "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "series_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES event_series (id), "occurrence_key" TEXT NULL, "original_starts_at" INTEGER NULL, "recurrence_exception" INTEGER NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("recurrence_exception" IN (0, 1)), "recurrence_suppressed" INTEGER NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("recurrence_suppressed" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "event_contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "event_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES events (id), "contact_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "task_series" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "priority" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal', "first_due_local" TEXT NOT NULL, "timezone_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "reminder_offset_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "rule_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "repeat_anchor" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'schedule', PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tasks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open', "due_at" INTEGER NULL, "reminder_at" INTEGER NULL, "event_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES events (id), "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "priority" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal', "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "completed_at" INTEGER NULL, "task_series_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES task_series (id), "task_occurrence_number" INTEGER NULL, "predecessor_task_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES tasks (id), "recurrence_scheduled_local" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "note_links" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "note_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES notes (id), "target_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_id" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "timer_sessions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "description" TEXT NULL, "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "stopped_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "billable_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "event_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES events (id), "task_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES tasks (id), "timer_session_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES timer_sessions (id), "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, "duration_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "amount_cents" INTEGER NULL, "currency" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EUR', "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unbilled', "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reminders" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "parent_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "parent_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "fire_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "delivered" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("delivered" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE INDEX workspaces_active_sort ON workspaces (sort_order) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX workspace_contacts_active_unique ON workspace_contacts (workspace_id, contact_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX workspace_contacts_active_contact ON workspace_contacts (contact_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX projects_active_workspace ON projects (workspace_id, archived, name) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX event_series_contacts_active_unique ON event_series_contacts (series_id, contact_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX events_active_workspace_range ON events (workspace_id, starts_at, ends_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX events_active_project ON events (project_id, starts_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND project_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX events_active_series_start ON events (series_id, starts_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND series_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX events_series_occurrence_unique ON events (series_id, occurrence_key) WHERE series_id IS NOT NULL AND occurrence_key IS NOT NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX event_contacts_active_unique ON event_contacts (event_id, contact_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX event_contacts_active_contact ON event_contacts (contact_id, event_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX tasks_active_workspace_status_due ON tasks (workspace_id, status, due_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX tasks_active_project ON tasks (project_id, due_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND project_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX tasks_active_contact ON tasks (contact_id, due_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND contact_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tasks_series_occurrence_unique ON tasks (task_series_id, task_occurrence_number) WHERE task_series_id IS NOT NULL AND task_occurrence_number IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX notes_active_workspace_updated ON notes (workspace_id, updated_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX notes_active_parent_updated ON notes (parent_type, parent_id, updated_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND parent_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX note_links_active_unique ON note_links (note_id, target_type, target_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX note_links_active_target ON note_links (target_type, target_id, updated_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX billable_items_active_workspace_status ON billable_items (workspace_id, status, created_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX billable_items_active_contact ON billable_items (contact_id, created_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND contact_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX billable_items_active_project ON billable_items (project_id, created_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND project_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX billable_items_active_timer_session ON billable_items (timer_session_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND timer_session_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX timer_sessions_single_running ON timer_sessions ((1)) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND stopped_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX reminders_active_parent ON reminders (parent_type, parent_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX event_series_active_workspace ON event_series (workspace_id, updated_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX task_series_active_workspace ON task_series (workspace_id, updated_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
